zh.lifeSummary: 當Laure de Lorraine於大約1235年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，她的父親Matthieu II de Lorraine43歲，母親Catherine de Limburg21歲。她於1250年3月9日與Jean de Dampierre I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年5月3日在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laure de Lorraine于大约1235年出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，她的父亲Matthieu II de Lorraine43岁，母亲Catherine de Limburg21岁。她于1250年3月9日与Jean de Dampierre I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1288年5月3日在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Laure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Laure de Lorraine was born about 1235, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Matthieu II de Lorraine, was 43 and her mother, Catherine de Limburg, was 21. She married Jean de Dampierre I on 9 March 1250. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 May 1288, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laure de Lorraine est née environ 1235, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Matthieu II de Lorraine, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Limburg, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Dampierre I le 9 mars 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1288, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laure de Lorraine um 1235 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthieu II de Lorraine 43 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Limburg 21. Sie hat am 9. März 1250 Jean de Dampierre I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1288 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laure de Lorraine è nata il circa 1235 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Matthieu II de Lorraine, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Limburg, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Dampierre I il 9 marzo 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 maggio 1288, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laure de Lorraineが約1235年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Matthieu II de Lorraineは43歳，母Catherine de Limburgは21歳であった。1250年3月9日にJean de Dampierre Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1288年5月3日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laure de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1235년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthieu II de Lorraine(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Limburg(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1250년 3월 9일 Jean de Dampierre I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 5월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laure de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Matthieu II de Lorraine, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Limburg, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Dampierre I em 9 de março de 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1288, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laure de Lorraine родилась около 1235 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Matthieu II de Lorraine было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Limburg, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Dampierre I 9 марта 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 мая 1288 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laure de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1235, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Matthieu II de Lorraine, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Catherine de Limburg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jean de Dampierre I el 9 de marzo de 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1288, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
